case_title: SUSANNE NEWMAN VS. IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC. REG. AGENT. CT CORPORATION IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC. REG. AGENT CT. CORPORATION
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC. REG. AGENT. CT CORPORATION IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC. REG. AGENT CT. CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2016 - CONTINUED TO AUG-17-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PER THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWMAN, SUSANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC (IJLSF, LLC) AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, IJLSF, LLC IS ADDED AS A DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC AND IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC (IJLSF, LLC)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUSANNE NEWMAN AND MANDY WATSON, VICE PRESIDENT OF OPERATIONS AND MATCHMAKING FOR IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC (ITJSF,LLC). PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANTS IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC & IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC. PARTIES STIPULATED TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC & IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC, AND ADD AS DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC (ITJSF,LLC). MS. WATSON AGREED TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON BEHALF OF IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC (ITJSF,LLC) AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANTS IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC. AND IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC BY THE COURT AT THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2016 AT 8:30 AM PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF SUSANNE NEWMAN, AND AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY NEWMAN, SUSANNE AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS, LLC. REG. AGENT. CT CORPORATION IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC. REG. AGENT CT. CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
